post.title: TUN网卡
post.excerptMarkdown: Golang Tun (gVisor) 完整代码: tun Android VPN Service Android 的VPN Service只能处理Tun接口 完整代码: VpnService
post.excerptHtml: Golang Tun (gVisor) 完整代码: tun Android VPN Service Android 的VPN Service只能处理Tun接口 完整代码: VpnService
post.bodyHtml:
Golang Tun (gVisor)

1import "gvisor.dev/gvisor/pkg/tcpip/stack" // gvisor2 3s := stack.New(stack.Options{4  NetworkProtocols:   []stack.NetworkProtocolFactory{ipv4.NewProtocol, ipv6.NewProtocol},5  TransportProtocols: []stack.TransportProtocolFactory{tcp.NewProtocol, udp.NewProtocol, icmp.NewProtocol4, icmp.NewProtocol6},6 })7 8ep := fdbased.New(&fdbased.Options{9   FDs:            []int{fd}, // fd: linux文件标识符, 如android中最后会获取到一个文件标识符10   MTU:            uint32(1500),11  })12 13 nicID := tcpip.NICID(s.UniqueID())14 if er := s.CreateNIC(nicID, ep); er != nil {15  ep.Attach(nil)16  return17 }18 19func isdns(opt *TunOpt, id stack.TransportEndpointID) bool {20 if id.LocalPort == 53 && (opt.DNSHijacking || id.LocalAddress.String() == opt.Gateway) {21  return true22 }23 return false24}25 26// TCP27 s.SetTransportProtocolHandler(tcp.ProtocolNumber, tcp.NewForwarder(s, defaultWndSize, maxConnAttempts,  func(r *tcp.ForwarderRequest) {28  wq := new(waiter.Queue)29  id := r.ID()30 31  ep, err := r.CreateEndpoint(wq)32  if err != nil {33   r.Complete(true)34   return35  }36  r.Complete(false)37 38 39  go func(local net.Conn, id stack.TransportEndpointID) {40   defer local.Close()41 42   if isdns(opt, id) { // 劫持一下dns43    /*44    * Handle DNS45    */46    return47   }48 49   target := net.JoinHostPort(id.LocalAddress.String(), id.LocalPort) // 远程目标地址50   nconn, er := net.Dial("tcp", target)51   if er != nil {52    return53   }54   defer conn.Close()55   utils.Relay(local, conn)56  }(gonet.NewTCPConn(wq, ep), id)57 }).HandlePacket)58 59 60// UDP61 s.SetTransportProtocolHandler(udp.ProtocolNumber, udp.NewForwarder(s, func(fr *udp.ForwarderRequest) {62    // handle udp, 和tcp差不多63 }).HandlePacket)

完整代码: tun

Android VPN Service

Android 的VPN Service只能处理Tun接口

1class MyVpnService : VpnService() {2    override fun onStartCommand(intent: Intent?, flags: Int, startId: Int): Int {3        Builder().apply {4            setMtu(1500)5            setSession("my vpn")6 7            addAddress("172.19.0.1", 24).addRoute("172.19.0.2", 32)8            addAddress("fdfe:dcba:9876::1", 126)9                .addRoute("2000::", 3) // https://issuetracker.google.com/issues/14963679010                .addRoute("fdfe:dcba:9876::2", 128)11 12            addDnsServer("172.19.0.2") // 记得在Tun中劫持172.19.0.2:53处理所有的DNS请求13 14            addDisallowedApplication("com.example") // Disallowed和Allowed不能同时调用15            // addAllowedApplication("com.example")16 17            const fd = establish()18/*19    fd 为 linux文件标识符20    如果是通过tun2socks这种命令行工具处理21    需要使用Linux socket将fd发送给子进程22           23    如果是调用so动态库则不需要24    25    通过unix文件socket发送sd26      private fun sendFd(path: String) {27            LocalSocket().use { localSocket ->28                localSocket.connect(29                    LocalSocketAddress(30                        path,31                        LocalSocketAddress.Namespace.FILESYSTEM32                    )33                )34                localSocket.setFileDescriptorsForSend(arrayOf(fd)) // <------35                localSocket.outputStream.write(42)36            }37    }38*/39        }40        return START_STICKY   41    }42 43 44}

完整代码: VpnService
